Bvlgari ladies' quartz watch features the logo as a design element, with a unique double-ring engraving on the case inspired by the curved inscriptions on ancient coins. It uses a Swiss imported movement and original components assembly. Purchasing this watch at such a low price with the same components as those in the official store is a great deal. The use of genuine movements represents fine craftsmanship. Available in various styles and colors, with diamond-set dials featuring natural diamonds, and stud-decorated dials with sunburst patterns. The watch has a sapphire crystal glass, set with natural pink jade, water-resistant to 50 meters, and comes with a stainless steel bracelet. Each diamond is individually polished, showcasing intricate craftsmanship. Comes with complete official packaging, suitable for gifting or personal use.

The new Bvlgari DIVAS' DREAM watch from the series features round brilliant-cut diamonds, amethyst, a white mother-of-pearl dial, and a purple Italian calfskin strap. It is water-resistant up to meters, powered by a Swiss quartz movement, with a rose gold case measuring millimeters in diameter. The rose gold petals are set with round brilliant-cut diamonds and alternating with four purple-red crystals, a mother-of-pearl dial, purple Italian calfskin strap, and a rose gold folding clasp. The Divas' Dream watch exudes bright colors and abundant vitality, inviting one to embrace life with passion. Inspired by the vibrant "Dolce Vita," the exquisite piece showcases a mix of purple and red crystals against a backdrop of a diamond-framed mother-of-pearl dial, embodying the unique spirit of the golden age of Rome. The watch is paired with a matching purple Italian calfskin strap, interpreting the series' iconic fan-shaped pattern with a dynamic aesthetic, high-end jewelry craftsmanship, and vibrant gemstones.

Bvlgari

DIVAS’ DREAM Bvlgari jewelry series! The watch features a Swiss ETA movement and a dial with a high level of difficulty in replicating the original design. The dazzling gemstones are cleverly combined with vibrant colors, showcasing Bvlgari's exceptional craftsmanship as a "master of colored gemstones." The crown is made up of movable steel hollow petals, highlighting the elegant and delicate gemstones. Various inlaid gemstones and diamonds are used to create unique fan-shaped ginkgo leaves, creating a wonderful harmony!
